# Hardware / vcan evidence requirements.
#
# Format:
# id|scope|status|required_trace_provenance|required_trace_id|required_report|notes
#
# status is one of:
# - missing: no checked-in real vcan/hardware evidence yet
# - complete: reduced trace(s) and a capture report are checked in
#
# required_trace_provenance is one of:
# - reduced-hardware: physical bus or real SocketCAN/vcan capture
#
# required_trace_id and required_report are `-` while missing.  When complete,
# required_trace_id must name an entry in tests/fixtures/traces/manifest.txt
# whose provenance is `reduced-hardware`, and required_report must name a path
# under tests/fixtures/hardware/capture_reports/.
#
# Maintained by hand: complete rows must have a report, and missing rows must not
# silently masquerade as hardware proof. This is an evidence record, not
# conformance evidence.
vcan_address_claim|Linux vcan SocketCAN address-claim smoke|complete|reduced-hardware|vcan_address_claim|tests/fixtures/hardware/capture_reports/vcan_address_claim.md|Capture candump -td -L from vcan0 while socketcan_address_claim emits Address Claimed
vcan_dm1|Linux vcan SocketCAN DM1 smoke|complete|reduced-hardware|vcan_dm1|tests/fixtures/hardware/capture_reports/vcan_dm1.md|Capture the DM1 frame emitted by socketcan_address_claim after SPN 100 FMI 1 is raised
physical_address_claim|Physical 250 kbit/s ISOBUS/J1939 address claim|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture Address Claimed on an isolated physical CAN interface with analyzer cross-check
peer_request_address_claim|Independent peer Request Address Claimed response|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture a service-tool or independent peer PGN Request and machbus response
tp_bam_transfer|Transport Protocol BAM transfer on vcan or physical bus|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture at least one multi-packet TP/BAM transfer visible to an external observer
etp_connection_transfer|Extended Transport Protocol connection transfer against independent observer|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture RTS CTS DPO DT and EOMA for a payload above the TP size range with an external observer
network_interconnect_router|Network interconnect routing across two observed bus segments|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture translated address claim and destination-specific traffic across an NIU or router bench setup
diagnostic_request_response|External diagnostic request/response workflow|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture DM1/DM2 request/response or DM11/DM3 clear workflow with an external peer
vt_object_pool_upload|VT object-pool upload against independent VT/reference peer|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture GetMemory/ObjectPool/EndOfObjectPool flow against independent VT or reference tool
vt_object_pool_upload_failure|VT object-pool upload failure against independent VT/reference peer|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture rejected object-pool upload or EndOfObjectPool failure without stale-pool acceptance against independent VT or reference tool
implement_message_broadcast|Implement and tractor message broadcast observed by independent tool|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture selected speed distance hitch PTO lighting or guidance messages from machbus and decode them with an independent observer
powertrain_engine_trace|Powertrain engine or transmission PGNs observed by independent tool|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture selected EEC TSC or transmission frames from machbus and verify source PGN and decoded values with an independent observer
tractor_ecu_facility_trace|Tractor ECU facility and maintain-power workflow against independent peer|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture required tractor facilities and maintain-power lifecycle frames with source-scoped peer observations
tc_ddop_upload|Task Controller DDOP upload against independent TC/reference peer|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture DDOP upload/activation against independent TC or reference tool
file_server_read_write|File Server read/write workflow against independent peer|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture connect/open/read/write/close workflow with independent FS client or server
section_control_lifecycle|Section Control master/client lifecycle against independent peer|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture Ready/PlayBack/pause/resume/abort lifecycle with independent SC peer
tim_authority_interlock|TIM authority and interlock workflow against independent peer|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture authority grant/revoke and blocked command behavior with independent TIM peer
nmea2000_gnss_environment_trace|NMEA 2000 selected GNSS navigation and environment traffic against independent observer|missing|reduced-hardware|-|-|Capture selected GNSS navigation or environment PGNs and verify decoded values with an independent NMEA 2000 observer
